allow: Bash(node -e "['contact','returns','affiliate','faq','science'].forEach\(p => { try { JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('templates/page.'+p+'.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\(p,'OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(p,'FAIL',e.message\); } }\); try { JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('templates/policies.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('policies OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('policies FAIL',e.message\); } try { JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('config/settings_schema.json','utf8'\)\); console.log\('settings_schema OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('settings_schema FAIL',e.message\); }")
